content:
# Slab Geometry

**Summary**: The physical shape and orientation of a subducting lithospheric plate.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-kesumastuti|Kesumastuti, 2025]] investigated the slab geometry beneath Sulawesi to identify multiple subduction zones.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-kesumastuti|Kesumastuti, 2025]] Crucial for understanding the tectonic evolution and seismic hazards in Indonesia.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-kesumastuti|Kesumastuti, 2025]] Inferred from 3D P-wave tomographic models.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- A third slab, referred to as the Sula slab, was identified in addition to the Celebes Sea and Sangihe slabs. ([[2025-kesumastuti|Kesumastuti, 2025, p. 43]])
